response.overview: A silent observation of a colonial cemetery in Ooty, India — built in 1870 during the British Raj. Moving through graves, the film encounters inscriptions, crosses, and statues gradually overtaken by vegetation, while a dog and crows occupy the space.
response.tagline: The dead made their covenant with God and were buried in stone — a century and a half later, only a dog bears witness.
response.title: After the Covenant
